# Title of the Change

**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Author:** [Use `git config user.name` or MCP to get author name] (+ AI pair programmer if applicable)
**Ticket:** t#### (if applicable)
**Type:** Bug Fix | Feature | Enhancement | Refactor | Performance | UX Improvement
**Component:** affected modules (e.g., Subscriptions, Invoicing, Core Models)
**Impact:** what areas are affected (e.g., User Experience, Data Integrity, Performance)

## 🎯 Summary

A concise paragraph explaining **what** was done and **why**. Include the problem that motivated the change and the high-level approach taken to solve it.

## ✨ Changes

### 1. First Logical Change

**File:** `app/path/to/file.py`

Describe what was changed and why. Include code snippets only when they help clarify the change:

```python
# Only include code snippets that illustrate key logic or API
example_code_here()
```

### 2. Second Logical Change

**File:** `app/path/to/other_file.py`

Continue describing changes grouped by logical unit, not by file.

<!-- Repeat as needed for additional changes -->

## 📁 Files Modified

- **`app/path/to/file.py`** — Brief description of what changed
- **`app/path/to/other_file.py`** — Brief description of what changed

## 📁 Files Created

- **`app/path/to/new_file.py`** — Purpose of the new file

<!-- Remove "Files Created" section if no new files were added -->

## 📚 Technical Details

Include relevant technical context such as:

- Data flow explanations
- Backward compatibility considerations
- Security and validation details
- Migration information (if applicable)

<!-- Remove this section for simple changes that don't need extra technical context -->

## 🧪 Manual Testing

Step-by-step scenarios to verify the change works correctly:

1. **Scenario name:**
   - Step-by-step instructions
   - **Verify:** Expected outcome

2. **Edge case scenario:**
   - Step-by-step instructions
   - **Verify:** Expected outcome

<!-- Include at least one happy path and one edge case -->

## 📝 Deployment Notes

- Migration requirements (or "No database migrations required")
- Configuration changes needed
- Post-deployment steps (commands to run, data to verify)
- Dependencies on other changes

## 🚀 Future Improvements

Potential enhancements for future iterations:

- Short description of improvement opportunity
- Short description of another opportunity
